Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class RodinElementDelta

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.SimpleDelta
org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinElementDelta
All Implemented Interfaces:
IRodinElementDelta
public class RodinElementDelta extends SimpleDelta implements IRodinElementDelta

    Returns deltas for the affected (added, removed, or changed) children.

    getChangedChildren()
    Returns deltas for the children which have changed.
    IRodinElement
    getElement()
    Returns the element that this delta describes a change to.
    IRodinElement
    getMovedFromElement()
    Returns an element describing this element before it was moved to its current location, or null if the F_MOVED_FROM change flag is not set.
    IRodinElement
    getMovedToElement()
    Returns an element describing this element in its new location, or null if the F_MOVED_TO change flag is not set.
    IRodinElementDelta[]
    getRemovedChildren()
    Returns deltas for the children which have been removed.

    Return the collection of resource deltas.

    Creates the nested deltas resulting from an move operation.

  • Constructor Details

    • RodinElementDelta

      public RodinElementDelta(IRodinElement element)
      Creates the root delta. To create the nested delta hierarchies use the following convenience methods. The root delta can be created at any level (for example: project, package root, package fragment...).
      • added(IRodinElement)
      • changed(IRodinElement)
      • moved(IRodinElement, IRodinElement)
      • removed(IRodinElement)
      • renamed(IRodinElement, IRodinElement)

  • Method Details

    • added

      public void added(IRodinElement element)
      Creates the nested deltas resulting from an add operation. Convenience method for creating add deltas. The constructor should be used to create the root delta and then an add operation should call this method.

    • added

      public void added(IRodinElement element, int flags)

    • changed

      public RodinElementDelta changed(IRodinElement element, int changeFlag)
      Creates the nested deltas resulting from a change operation. Convenience method for creating change deltas. The constructor should be used to create the root delta and then a change operation should call this method.

    • closed

      public void closed(IRodinElement element)
      Creates the nested deltas for a closed element.

      Returns:

      Description copied from interface: IRodinElementDelta

      Returns:

    • getResourceDeltas

      public org.eclipse.core.resources.IResourceDelta[] getResourceDeltas()
      Return the collection of resource deltas. Return null if none.
      Specified by:
      getResourceDeltas in interface IRodinElementDelta
      Returns:
      the underlying resource deltas, or null if none

    • movedFrom

      public void movedFrom(IRodinElement movedFromElement, IRodinElement movedToElement)
      Creates the nested deltas resulting from an move operation. Convenience method for creating the "move from" delta. The constructor should be used to create the root delta and then the move operation should call this method.

    • movedTo

      public void movedTo(IRodinElement movedToElement, IRodinElement movedFromElement)
      Creates the nested deltas resulting from an move operation. Convenience method for creating the "move to" delta. The constructor should be used to create the root delta and then the move operation should call this method.

    • opened

      public void opened(IRodinElement element)
      Creates the nested deltas for an opened element.

    • removed

      public void removed(IRodinElement element)
      Creates the nested deltas resulting from an delete operation. Convenience method for creating removed deltas. The constructor should be used to create the root delta and then the delete operation should call this method.

    • removed

      public void removed(IRodinElement element, int flags)

    • toDebugString

      public String toDebugString(int depth)
      Returns a string representation of this delta's structure suitable for debug purposes.
      See Also:
      • toString()

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this delta's structure suitable for debug purposes.
